TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Saint Lucia o i kawaliay no Caribbean riyar mingataay to Tasiyang a pala kitakit. Itiraay i ka'amis ato katimolay no France a Martinique pala ko Saint Vincen and the Grenadines kitakit, nao mimingay Antilles a palapalaan. O tadamaci o Caetri. Nano pakayraan a sowal O Saint Lucia nai Lucia (ikor ni Yis 283-304 miheca) ko pipanganganan. Saint Lucia ato Ireland o dengan tosaay ko no fafahiyan ngangan ko pipangangan to salongoc sakowan to kitakit (no Ireland ci Celtic misofocay fafahiyan a kawas AI pangangan). Nikawrira, Saint Lucia o dengan cecay so'elinay fafahiyan o no likisi a tamdaw a ngangan. o'asan a sowal no France a pakataminaay i 12 filad 13 romai'ad (Saint Luci romi'ad) i palaan ma'alol, nanoya o nia ngangan ko pangangan tonia pala. Likisi ．1963 miheca, Inkiris tamdaw micingcing to nia pala. ．1651 miheca, France tamdaw micalap. ．1814 miheca, midotoc "1814 miheca Paris tatoneken" misaheci o nia pala mala no Inkiris a micingcingan a sera. ．1979 miheca 2 folad 22 romi'ad, mihapiw to sapisiiked, o tata'akay Inkiris a lekatep a kitakit. Sici Saint Lucia o nano tata'akay Inkiris a lekatep hongtian kitakit a misiikeday, midemakay to hontian rikec. Saint Lucia a kakeridan no kitakit o tapang no Saint Lucia, malecad to no Inkiris a sawara'an, no Saint Lucia a congto o todong no kitakit a taypiaw. Ci Compton na patireng cingra to polong misakoliay no sici a kasarekad mikerid to Saint Lucia a pasayra i misiiked. Saint Lucia kalomaocan malitosaay faco a selal a kitakit, o fafa'eday kalomaocan ato kararemay kalomaocan, o citodongay mirikecay to nia kitakit. Fafa'eday kalomaocan 11 ko tamdaw sakapot, kararemay kalomaocan o 17 ko tamdaw sakapot, 5 miheca ko liyad no halafin, milaheciay to nisingkiwan . O kakeridan congli no Saint Lucia kitakit o tatapangan no sifo, o no kararemay kalomaocan 'alomanay a kasarekad a kakeridan , o kalomaocan ko misikiway. Saint Lucia misotiri' to England ato Quebec, o macacamolay to Inkiris, Amilika, France faco ato Europe France faco ko rikecan. Kacacofelan a demak Saint Lucia ato tariktikay i Caribbean riyar a Amilika, Inkiris, Canada ato France ta'akay kitakit ko kasasicofel lali'ayan. I matini awaay ko kararawrawan i kasakitakit ko Saint Lucia. O Saint Lucia o no Taywan a kacacofelan a kitakit, i Taypi mapatireng ko kadademakan . Saint Lucia o kapolongan lekapot, kawaliay Caribbean kitakit sakapot ato France sowal kitakit ato sa'etal kasakitakit a sakapot. O Saint Lucia tata'akay Inkiris a lekatep hongtian kitakit. Saint Lucia i 1979 miheca 12 folad 9 romi'ad mala no Linhoko saka 152 a sakapot. Tangasa 2018 miheca 1 folad, i 2017 miheca 2 folad 22 romi'ad mipatireng ci Persia Richardson o no Saint Lucia i Linhoko a taypiaw. Sofitay O kasasiiked a sakowan Palong no pala mala 10 ko sa'etal (全島分10區). Anse Raleigh sa'etal Canaris sa'etal Cadtri sa'etal Choiseul sa'etal Dennery sa'etalGroelette sa'etal Labory sa'etal Miku sa'etal Soufriere sa'etal Vieux Fort sa'etal Roma ira ko cecay 78.3 pinfang koli a lotoklan midipotan sa'etal. Palapalaan Saint Lucia a namalan lotok pala adihay ko roma a Caribbean riyar pala a lotokan, satakaraway a tono'an lotok o Gimie lotok (Mount Gimie), nai riyaran 950 kongce. O ci mineral nanom ato fa'edatay sera a kinaira. Fa'edetay romi'ad, o salawacan a nanom to mihecaan 1400mm, salaloma'an no hekal a takaraway sera 3500mm. Kafafalic no romi'ad Fa'edetay kafafalic romi'ad, Cobain romi'ad masilsil a fa'edetay kala'oraday romi'ad, macangil no kawali ka'amisay fali, kakedalan nai 12 folad 1 romi'ad tangasa 5 filad 31 romi'ad, ka'oradan i 6 folad 1 romi'ad tangasa 11 folad 30 romi'ad (o sasowalen no itiniay to kafaliyosan romi'ad). O romi'ad salongan kahemhem 30˚C (86.0˚F), dadaya salongan kahemhem 24˚C (75.2˚F). Nawhani milingataay to sasifo'ay sakonis, orasaka kasi'enawan kaciherangan tosaay ko hemhem. Mihecaan katefad no 'orad salongan nai salawacan no riyar 1,300mm (51.2 inch) tangasa lotokay a 'orad 3,810mm (150 inch). Kicay Linhoko pala macowatay cemahaday a kitakit ko Saint Lucia, o nia pangangan o mamala cemahaday a kitakit, nika nahan o Saint Lucia a palapalaan iraay ko kasasiromaan. Padamaay lingad micalap to GDP a 82.8%, roma a kikayan ato omahan, masisil calap 14.2% ato 2.9%. Kicay a kadademak o misasimalay ato misa'epahay ko tayal. Latin Amilika safaniyot a pawli i Europe pacomoday a demak mafalic ato roma a kalalifetan mapatongal i Saint Lucia a kicay kasairaira macowat a tadamanay demak. O Saint Lucia malamisolotay to roma a kitakit malali'acaay ato mipacefongay, mangalef o kingko ato mirarakatay ko sakacikinaira. Misanga'ay a citodongay i kawakiay no Caribbean riyar a kasa'etal ko sasiromaan, o sifo mitanam mipalowad pacomahad. O kacakat no kalali'aca (infalarion) oya to a maserarem, i 2006 miheca tangasa 2008 mihecaan salongan 5.5%. Saint Lucia a dafongan a payso o nano kawaliay Caribbean payso. Tadamaanay tamdaw Arthur Lewis, 1979 mihecaan Nobel prize kicay a cikompayay. Derek Walcott, 1992 mihecaan Nobel prize no tilidan a cikompayay. Mirarakatay Pawa'ayan 23). (nano nina'angan tilid i 2022-09-20) (Inkiris sowal). 4. St. Lucia. cs.mfa.gov.cn. (2021-02-24). (nano nina'angan tilid i 2020-08-17). 6. St. Lucia opens embassy in Taiwan; first in Asia - Focus Taiwan. focustaiwan.tw. (2021-02-24). (nano nina'angan tilid i 2020-11-08) (Taywan).
S.PHON: saint ɾo~u~uʦia o~u i kawaɾiaj no~u ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan rijar miŋataaj to~u tasijaŋ a paɾa kitakit. itiraaj i kaʡamis ato~u katimo~uɾaj no~u franʦə a martini*o~u~uə paɾa ko~u saint b~vinʦən anɬ~ɮ tħə *rənaɬ~ɮinəs kitakit, nao~u mimiŋaj antiɾɾəs a paɾapaɾaan. o~u taɬ~ɮamaʦi o~u ʦaətri. nano~u pakajraan a so~uwaɾ o~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia nai ɾo~u~uʦia (iko~ur ni jis ***-*** miħəʦa) ko~u pipaŋaŋanan. saint ɾo~u~uʦia ato~u irəɾanɬ~ɮ o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan to~usaaj ko~u no~u fafaħijan ŋaŋan ko~u pipaŋaŋan to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ sako~uwan to~u kitakit (no~u irəɾanɬ~ɮ ʦi ʦəɾtiʦ miso~ufo~uʦaj fafaħijan a kawas ai paŋaŋan). nikawrira, saint ɾo~u~uʦia o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan ʦəʦaj so~uʡəɾinaj fafaħijan o~u no~u ɾikisi a tamɬ~ɮaw a ŋaŋan. o~uʡasan a so~uwaɾ no~u franʦə a pakataminaaj i ** fiɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umaiʡaɬ~ɮ (saint ɾo~u~uʦi ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ) i paɾaan maʡaɾo~uɾ, nano~uja o~u nia ŋaŋan ko~u paŋaŋan to~unia paɾa. ɾikisi ***** miħəʦa, inkiris tamɬ~ɮaw miʦiŋʦiŋ to~u nia paɾa. ***** miħəʦa, franʦə tamɬ~ɮaw miʦaɾap. ***** miħəʦa, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ "**** miħəʦa paris tato~unəkən" misaħəʦi o~u nia paɾa maɾa no~u inkiris a miʦiŋʦiŋan a səra. ***** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miħapiw to~u sapisiikəɬ~ɮ, o~u tataʡakaj inkiris a ɾəkatəp a kitakit. siʦi saint ɾo~u~uʦia o~u nano~u tataʡakaj inkiris a ɾəkatəp ħo~uŋtian kitakit a misiikəɬ~ɮaj, miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u ħo~untian rikəʦ. saint ɾo~u~uʦia a kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kitakit o~u tapaŋ no~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u inkiris a sawaraʡan, no~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia a ʦo~uŋto~u o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u kitakit a tajpiaw. ʦi ʦo~umpto~un na patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u po~uɾo~uŋ misako~uɾiaj no~u siʦi a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia a pasajra i misiikəɬ~ɮ. saint ɾo~u~uʦia kaɾo~umao~uʦan maɾito~usaaj faʦo~u a səɾaɾ a kitakit, o~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj kaɾo~umao~uʦan ato~u kararəmaj kaɾo~umao~uʦan, o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj mirikəʦaj to~u nia kitakit. fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj kaɾo~umao~uʦan ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw sakapo~ut, kararəmaj kaɾo~umao~uʦan o~u ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw sakapo~ut, * miħəʦa ko~u ɾijaɬ~ɮ no~u ħaɾafin, miɾaħəʦiaj to~u nisiŋkiwan . o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦo~uŋɾi no~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia kitakit o~u tatapaŋan no~u sifo~u, o~u no~u kararəmaj kaɾo~umao~uʦan ʡaɾo~umanaj a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ a kakəriɬ~ɮan , o~u kaɾo~umao~uʦan ko~u misikiwaj. saint ɾo~u~uʦia miso~utiriʡ to~u əŋɾanɬ~ɮ ato~u *o~u~uəb~b~vəʦ, o~u maʦaʦamo~uɾaj to~u inkiris, amiɾika, franʦə faʦo~u ato~u əo~u~uro~upə franʦə faʦo~u ko~u rikəʦan. kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak saint ɾo~u~uʦia ato~u tariktikaj i ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan rijar a amiɾika, inkiris, ʦanaɬ~ɮa ato~u franʦə taʡakaj kitakit ko~u kasasiʦo~ufəɾ ɾaɾiʡajan. i matini awaaj ko~u kararawrawan i kasakitakit ko~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia. o~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia o~u no~u tajwan a kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a kitakit, i tajpi mapatirəŋ ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan . saint ɾo~u~uʦia o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan ɾəkapo~ut, kawaɾiaj ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan kitakit sakapo~ut ato~u franʦə so~uwaɾ kitakit ato~u saʡətaɾ kasakitakit a sakapo~ut. o~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia tataʡakaj inkiris a ɾəkatəp ħo~uŋtian kitakit. saint ɾo~u~uʦia i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾa no~u ɾinħo~uko~u saka *** a sakapo~ut. taŋasa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mipatirəŋ ʦi pərsia riʦħarɬ~ɮso~un o~u no~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia i ɾinħo~uko~u a tajpiaw. so~ufitaj o~u kasasiikəɬ~ɮ a sako~uwan paɾo~uŋ no~u paɾa maɾa ** ko~u saʡətaɾ (******). ansə raɾəi*ħ saʡətaɾ ʦanaris saʡətaɾ ʦaɬ~ɮtri saʡətaɾ ʦħo~uisəo~u~uɾ saʡətaɾ ɬ~ɮənnərj saʡətaɾ*ro~uəɾəttə saʡətaɾ ɾab~b~vo~urj saʡətaɾ miko~u~u saʡətaɾ so~uo~u~ufriərə saʡətaɾ b~viəo~u~ux fo~urt saʡətaɾ ro~uma ira ko~u ʦəʦaj **.* pinfaŋ ko~uɾi a ɾo~uto~ukɾan miɬ~ɮipo~utan saʡətaɾ. paɾapaɾaan saint ɾo~u~uʦia a namaɾan ɾo~uto~uk paɾa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ro~uma a ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan rijar paɾa a ɾo~uto~ukan, satakarawaj a to~uno~uʡan ɾo~uto~uk o~u *imiə ɾo~uto~uk (mo~uo~u~unt *imiə), nai rijaran *** ko~uŋʦə. o~u ʦi minəraɾ nano~um ato~u faʡəɬ~ɮataj səra a kinaira. faʡəɬ~ɮətaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u saɾawaʦan a nano~um to~u miħəʦaan ****mm, saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ħəkaɾ a takarawaj səra ****mm. kafafaɾiʦ no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ faʡəɬ~ɮətaj kafafaɾiʦ ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~ub~b~vain ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ masiɾsiɾ a faʡəɬ~ɮətaj kaɾaʡo~uraɬ~ɮaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maʦaŋiɾ no~u kawaɾi kaʡamisaj faɾi, kakəɬ~ɮaɾan nai ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taŋasa * fiɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, kaʡo~uraɬ~ɮan i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taŋasa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ (o~u saso~uwaɾən no~u itiniaj to~u kafaɾijo~usan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ). o~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ saɾo~uŋan kaħəmħəm ***ʦ (**.**f), ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja saɾo~uŋan kaħəmħəm ***ʦ (**.**f). nawħani miɾiŋataaj to~u sasifo~uʡaj sako~unis, o~urasaka kasiʡənawan kaʦiħəraŋan to~usaaj ko~u ħəmħəm. miħəʦaan katəfaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ saɾo~uŋan nai saɾawaʦan no~u rijar *,***mm (**.* inʦħ) taŋasa ɾo~uto~ukaj a ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ *,***mm (*** inʦħ). kiʦaj ɾinħo~uko~u paɾa maʦo~uwataj ʦəmaħaɬ~ɮaj a kitakit ko~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia, o~u nia paŋaŋan o~u mamaɾa ʦəmaħaɬ~ɮaj a kitakit, nika naħan o~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia a paɾapaɾaan iraaj ko~u kasasiro~umaan. paɬ~ɮamaaj ɾiŋaɬ~ɮ miʦaɾap to~u *ɬ~ɮp a **.*%, ro~uma a kikajan ato~u o~umaħan, masisiɾ ʦaɾap **.*% ato~u *.*%. kiʦaj a kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak o~u misasimaɾaj ato~u misaʡəpaħaj ko~u tajaɾ. ɾatin amiɾika safanijo~ut a pawɾi i əo~u~uro~upə paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak mafaɾiʦ ato~u ro~uma a kaɾaɾifətan mapato~uŋaɾ i saint ɾo~u~uʦia a kiʦaj kasairaira maʦo~uwat a taɬ~ɮamanaj ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia maɾamiso~uɾo~utaj to~u ro~uma a kitakit maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj ato~u mipaʦəfo~uŋaj, maŋaɾəf o~u kiŋko~u ato~u mirarakataj ko~u sakaʦikinaira. misaŋaʡaj a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj i kawakiaj no~u ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan rijar a kasaʡətaɾ ko~u sasiro~umaan, o~u sifo~u mitanam mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ paʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ. o~u kaʦakat no~u kaɾaɾiʡaʦa (infaɾario~un) o~uja to~u a masərarəm, i **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦaan saɾo~uŋan *.*%. saint ɾo~u~uʦia a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋan a pajso~u o~u nano~u kawaɾiaj ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan pajso~u. taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw artħo~u~ur ɾəwis, **** miħəʦaan no~ub~b~vəɾ pri*ə kiʦaj a ʦiko~umpajaj. ɬ~ɮərək waɾʦo~utt, **** miħəʦaan no~ub~b~vəɾ pri*ə no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮan a ʦiko~umpajaj. mirarakataj pawaʡajan **). (nano~u ninaʡaŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ****-**-**) (inkiris so~uwaɾ). *. st. ɾo~u~uʦia. ʦs.mfa.*o~ub~v.ʦn. (****-**-**). (nano~u ninaʡaŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ****-**-**). *. st. ɾo~u~uʦia o~upəns əmb~b~vassj in taiwan; first in asia - fo~uʦo~u~us taiwan. fo~uʦo~u~ustaiwan.tw. (****-**-**). (nano~u ninaʡaŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ****-**-**) (tajwan).
S.FORM: Saint Lucia o i kawaliay no Caribbean riyar mingataay to Tasiyang a pala kitakit. Itiraay i ka'amis ato katimolay no France a Martinique pala ko Saint Vincen and the Grenadines kitakit, nao mimingay Antilles a palapalaan. O tadamaci o Caetri. Nano pakayraan a sowal O Saint Lucia nai Lucia (ikor ni Yis 283-304 miheca) ko pipanganganan. Saint Lucia ato Ireland o dengan tosaay ko no fafahiyan ngangan ko pipangangan to salongoc sakowan to kitakit (no Ireland ci Celtic misofocay fafahiyan a kawas AI pangangan). Nikawrira, Saint Lucia o dengan cecay so'elinay fafahiyan o no likisi a tamdaw a ngangan. o'asan a sowal no France a pakataminaay i 12 filad 13 romai'ad (Saint Luci romi'ad) i palaan ma'alol, nanoya o nia ngangan ko pangangan tonia pala. Likisi ．1963 miheca, Inkiris tamdaw micingcing to nia pala. ．1651 miheca, France tamdaw micalap. ．1814 miheca, midotoc "1814 miheca Paris tatoneken" misaheci o nia pala mala no Inkiris a micingcingan a sera. ．1979 miheca 2 folad 22 romi'ad, mihapiw to sapisiiked, o tata'akay Inkiris a lekatep a kitakit. Sici Saint Lucia o nano tata'akay Inkiris a lekatep hongtian kitakit a misiikeday, midemakay to hontian rikec. Saint Lucia a kakeridan no kitakit o tapang no Saint Lucia, malecad to no Inkiris a sawara'an, no Saint Lucia a congto o todong no kitakit a taypiaw. Ci Compton na patireng cingra to polong misakoliay no sici a kasarekad mikerid to Saint Lucia a pasayra i misiiked. Saint Lucia kalomaocan malitosaay faco a selal a kitakit, o fafa'eday kalomaocan ato kararemay kalomaocan, o citodongay mirikecay to nia kitakit. Fafa'eday kalomaocan 11 ko tamdaw sakapot, kararemay kalomaocan o 17 ko tamdaw sakapot, 5 miheca ko liyad no halafin, milaheciay to nisingkiwan . O kakeridan congli no Saint Lucia kitakit o tatapangan no sifo, o no kararemay kalomaocan 'alomanay a kasarekad a kakeridan , o kalomaocan ko misikiway. Saint Lucia misotiri' to England ato Quebec, o macacamolay to Inkiris, Amilika, France faco ato Europe France faco ko rikecan. Kacacofelan a demak Saint Lucia ato tariktikay i Caribbean riyar a Amilika, Inkiris, Canada ato France ta'akay kitakit ko kasasicofel lali'ayan. I matini awaay ko kararawrawan i kasakitakit ko Saint Lucia. O Saint Lucia o no Taywan a kacacofelan a kitakit, i Taypi mapatireng ko kadademakan . Saint Lucia o kapolongan lekapot, kawaliay Caribbean kitakit sakapot ato France sowal kitakit ato sa'etal kasakitakit a sakapot. O Saint Lucia tata'akay Inkiris a lekatep hongtian kitakit. Saint Lucia i 1979 miheca 12 folad 9 romi'ad mala no Linhoko saka 152 a sakapot. Tangasa 2018 miheca 1 folad, i 2017 miheca 2 folad 22 romi'ad mipatireng ci Persia Richardson o no Saint Lucia i Linhoko a taypiaw. Sofitay O kasasiiked a sakowan Palong no pala mala 10 ko sa'etal (全島分10區). Anse Raleigh sa'etal Canaris sa'etal Cadtri sa'etal Choiseul sa'etal Dennery sa'etalGroelette sa'etal Labory sa'etal Miku sa'etal Soufriere sa'etal Vieux Fort sa'etal Roma ira ko cecay 78.3 pinfang koli a lotoklan midipotan sa'etal. Palapalaan Saint Lucia a namalan lotok pala adihay ko roma a Caribbean riyar pala a lotokan, satakaraway a tono'an lotok o Gimie lotok (Mount Gimie), nai riyaran 950 kongce. O ci mineral nanom ato fa'edatay sera a kinaira. Fa'edetay romi'ad, o salawacan a nanom to mihecaan 1400mm, salaloma'an no hekal a takaraway sera 3500mm. Kafafalic no romi'ad Fa'edetay kafafalic romi'ad, Cobain romi'ad masilsil a fa'edetay kala'oraday romi'ad, macangil no kawali ka'amisay fali, kakedalan nai 12 folad 1 romi'ad tangasa 5 filad 31 romi'ad, ka'oradan i 6 folad 1 romi'ad tangasa 11 folad 30 romi'ad (o sasowalen no itiniay to kafaliyosan romi'ad). O romi'ad salongan kahemhem 30˚C (86.0˚F), dadaya salongan kahemhem 24˚C (75.2˚F). Nawhani milingataay to sasifo'ay sakonis, orasaka kasi'enawan kaciherangan tosaay ko hemhem. Mihecaan katefad no 'orad salongan nai salawacan no riyar 1,300mm (51.2 inch) tangasa lotokay a 'orad 3,810mm (150 inch). Kicay Linhoko pala macowatay cemahaday a kitakit ko Saint Lucia, o nia pangangan o mamala cemahaday a kitakit, nika nahan o Saint Lucia a palapalaan iraay ko kasasiromaan. Padamaay lingad micalap to GDP a 82.8%, roma a kikayan ato omahan, masisil calap 14.2% ato 2.9%. Kicay a kadademak o misasimalay ato misa'epahay ko tayal. Latin Amilika safaniyot a pawli i Europe pacomoday a demak mafalic ato roma a kalalifetan mapatongal i Saint Lucia a kicay kasairaira macowat a tadamanay demak. O Saint Lucia malamisolotay to roma a kitakit malali'acaay ato mipacefongay, mangalef o kingko ato mirarakatay ko sakacikinaira. Misanga'ay a citodongay i kawakiay no Caribbean riyar a kasa'etal ko sasiromaan, o sifo mitanam mipalowad pacomahad. O kacakat no kalali'aca (infalarion) oya to a maserarem, i 2006 miheca tangasa 2008 mihecaan salongan 5.5%. Saint Lucia a dafongan a payso o nano kawaliay Caribbean payso. Tadamaanay tamdaw Arthur Lewis, 1979 mihecaan Nobel prize kicay a cikompayay. Derek Walcott, 1992 mihecaan Nobel prize no tilidan a cikompayay. Mirarakatay Pawa'ayan 23). (nano nina'angan tilid i 2022-09-20) (Inkiris sowal). 4. St. Lucia. cs.mfa.gov.cn. (2021-02-24). (nano nina'angan tilid i 2020-08-17). 6. St. Lucia opens embassy in Taiwan; first in Asia - Focus Taiwan. focustaiwan.tw. (2021-02-24). (nano nina'angan tilid i 2020-11-08) (Taywan).
S.PHON: saint ɾo~u~uʦia o~u i kawaɾiaj no~u ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan rijar miŋataaj to~u tasijaŋ a paɾa kitakit. itiraaj i kaʡamis ato~u katimo~uɾaj no~u franʦə a martini*o~u~uə paɾa ko~u saint b~vinʦən anɬ~ɮ tħə *rənaɬ~ɮinəs kitakit, nao~u mimiŋaj antiɾɾəs a paɾapaɾaan. o~u taɬ~ɮamaʦi o~u ʦaətri. nano~u pakajraan a so~uwaɾ o~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia nai ɾo~u~uʦia (iko~ur ni jis ***-*** miħəʦa) ko~u pipaŋaŋanan. saint ɾo~u~uʦia ato~u irəɾanɬ~ɮ o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan to~usaaj ko~u no~u fafaħijan ŋaŋan ko~u pipaŋaŋan to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ sako~uwan to~u kitakit (no~u irəɾanɬ~ɮ ʦi ʦəɾtiʦ miso~ufo~uʦaj fafaħijan a kawas ai paŋaŋan). nikawrira, saint ɾo~u~uʦia o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan ʦəʦaj so~uʡəɾinaj fafaħijan o~u no~u ɾikisi a tamɬ~ɮaw a ŋaŋan. o~uʡasan a so~uwaɾ no~u franʦə a pakataminaaj i ** fiɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umaiʡaɬ~ɮ (saint ɾo~u~uʦi ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ) i paɾaan maʡaɾo~uɾ, nano~uja o~u nia ŋaŋan ko~u paŋaŋan to~unia paɾa. ɾikisi ***** miħəʦa, inkiris tamɬ~ɮaw miʦiŋʦiŋ to~u nia paɾa. ***** miħəʦa, franʦə tamɬ~ɮaw miʦaɾap. ***** miħəʦa, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ "**** miħəʦa paris tato~unəkən" misaħəʦi o~u nia paɾa maɾa no~u inkiris a miʦiŋʦiŋan a səra. ***** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miħapiw to~u sapisiikəɬ~ɮ, o~u tataʡakaj inkiris a ɾəkatəp a kitakit. siʦi saint ɾo~u~uʦia o~u nano~u tataʡakaj inkiris a ɾəkatəp ħo~uŋtian kitakit a misiikəɬ~ɮaj, miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u ħo~untian rikəʦ. saint ɾo~u~uʦia a kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kitakit o~u tapaŋ no~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u inkiris a sawaraʡan, no~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia a ʦo~uŋto~u o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u kitakit a tajpiaw. ʦi ʦo~umpto~un na patirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u po~uɾo~uŋ misako~uɾiaj no~u siʦi a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia a pasajra i misiikəɬ~ɮ. saint ɾo~u~uʦia kaɾo~umao~uʦan maɾito~usaaj faʦo~u a səɾaɾ a kitakit, o~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj kaɾo~umao~uʦan ato~u kararəmaj kaɾo~umao~uʦan, o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj mirikəʦaj to~u nia kitakit. fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj kaɾo~umao~uʦan ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw sakapo~ut, kararəmaj kaɾo~umao~uʦan o~u ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw sakapo~ut, * miħəʦa ko~u ɾijaɬ~ɮ no~u ħaɾafin, miɾaħəʦiaj to~u nisiŋkiwan . o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦo~uŋɾi no~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia kitakit o~u tatapaŋan no~u sifo~u, o~u no~u kararəmaj kaɾo~umao~uʦan ʡaɾo~umanaj a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ a kakəriɬ~ɮan , o~u kaɾo~umao~uʦan ko~u misikiwaj. saint ɾo~u~uʦia miso~utiriʡ to~u əŋɾanɬ~ɮ ato~u *o~u~uəb~b~vəʦ, o~u maʦaʦamo~uɾaj to~u inkiris, amiɾika, franʦə faʦo~u ato~u əo~u~uro~upə franʦə faʦo~u ko~u rikəʦan. kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak saint ɾo~u~uʦia ato~u tariktikaj i ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan rijar a amiɾika, inkiris, ʦanaɬ~ɮa ato~u franʦə taʡakaj kitakit ko~u kasasiʦo~ufəɾ ɾaɾiʡajan. i matini awaaj ko~u kararawrawan i kasakitakit ko~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia. o~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia o~u no~u tajwan a kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a kitakit, i tajpi mapatirəŋ ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan . saint ɾo~u~uʦia o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan ɾəkapo~ut, kawaɾiaj ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan kitakit sakapo~ut ato~u franʦə so~uwaɾ kitakit ato~u saʡətaɾ kasakitakit a sakapo~ut. o~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia tataʡakaj inkiris a ɾəkatəp ħo~uŋtian kitakit. saint ɾo~u~uʦia i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾa no~u ɾinħo~uko~u saka *** a sakapo~ut. taŋasa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mipatirəŋ ʦi pərsia riʦħarɬ~ɮso~un o~u no~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia i ɾinħo~uko~u a tajpiaw. so~ufitaj o~u kasasiikəɬ~ɮ a sako~uwan paɾo~uŋ no~u paɾa maɾa ** ko~u saʡətaɾ (******). ansə raɾəi*ħ saʡətaɾ ʦanaris saʡətaɾ ʦaɬ~ɮtri saʡətaɾ ʦħo~uisəo~u~uɾ saʡətaɾ ɬ~ɮənnərj saʡətaɾ*ro~uəɾəttə saʡətaɾ ɾab~b~vo~urj saʡətaɾ miko~u~u saʡətaɾ so~uo~u~ufriərə saʡətaɾ b~viəo~u~ux fo~urt saʡətaɾ ro~uma ira ko~u ʦəʦaj **.* pinfaŋ ko~uɾi a ɾo~uto~ukɾan miɬ~ɮipo~utan saʡətaɾ. paɾapaɾaan saint ɾo~u~uʦia a namaɾan ɾo~uto~uk paɾa aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u ro~uma a ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan rijar paɾa a ɾo~uto~ukan, satakarawaj a to~uno~uʡan ɾo~uto~uk o~u *imiə ɾo~uto~uk (mo~uo~u~unt *imiə), nai rijaran *** ko~uŋʦə. o~u ʦi minəraɾ nano~um ato~u faʡəɬ~ɮataj səra a kinaira. faʡəɬ~ɮətaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u saɾawaʦan a nano~um to~u miħəʦaan ****mm, saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ħəkaɾ a takarawaj səra ****mm. kafafaɾiʦ no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ faʡəɬ~ɮətaj kafafaɾiʦ ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦo~ub~b~vain ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ masiɾsiɾ a faʡəɬ~ɮətaj kaɾaʡo~uraɬ~ɮaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maʦaŋiɾ no~u kawaɾi kaʡamisaj faɾi, kakəɬ~ɮaɾan nai ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taŋasa * fiɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, kaʡo~uraɬ~ɮan i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taŋasa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ (o~u saso~uwaɾən no~u itiniaj to~u kafaɾijo~usan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ). o~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ saɾo~uŋan kaħəmħəm ***ʦ (**.**f), ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja saɾo~uŋan kaħəmħəm ***ʦ (**.**f). nawħani miɾiŋataaj to~u sasifo~uʡaj sako~unis, o~urasaka kasiʡənawan kaʦiħəraŋan to~usaaj ko~u ħəmħəm. miħəʦaan katəfaɬ~ɮ no~u ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ saɾo~uŋan nai saɾawaʦan no~u rijar *,***mm (**.* inʦħ) taŋasa ɾo~uto~ukaj a ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ *,***mm (*** inʦħ). kiʦaj ɾinħo~uko~u paɾa maʦo~uwataj ʦəmaħaɬ~ɮaj a kitakit ko~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia, o~u nia paŋaŋan o~u mamaɾa ʦəmaħaɬ~ɮaj a kitakit, nika naħan o~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia a paɾapaɾaan iraaj ko~u kasasiro~umaan. paɬ~ɮamaaj ɾiŋaɬ~ɮ miʦaɾap to~u *ɬ~ɮp a **.*%, ro~uma a kikajan ato~u o~umaħan, masisiɾ ʦaɾap **.*% ato~u *.*%. kiʦaj a kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmak o~u misasimaɾaj ato~u misaʡəpaħaj ko~u tajaɾ. ɾatin amiɾika safanijo~ut a pawɾi i əo~u~uro~upə paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak mafaɾiʦ ato~u ro~uma a kaɾaɾifətan mapato~uŋaɾ i saint ɾo~u~uʦia a kiʦaj kasairaira maʦo~uwat a taɬ~ɮamanaj ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u saint ɾo~u~uʦia maɾamiso~uɾo~utaj to~u ro~uma a kitakit maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj ato~u mipaʦəfo~uŋaj, maŋaɾəf o~u kiŋko~u ato~u mirarakataj ko~u sakaʦikinaira. misaŋaʡaj a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj i kawakiaj no~u ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan rijar a kasaʡətaɾ ko~u sasiro~umaan, o~u sifo~u mitanam mipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ paʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮ. o~u kaʦakat no~u kaɾaɾiʡaʦa (infaɾario~un) o~uja to~u a masərarəm, i **** miħəʦa taŋasa **** miħəʦaan saɾo~uŋan *.*%. saint ɾo~u~uʦia a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋan a pajso~u o~u nano~u kawaɾiaj ʦarib~b~vb~b~vəan pajso~u. taɬ~ɮamaanaj tamɬ~ɮaw artħo~u~ur ɾəwis, **** miħəʦaan no~ub~b~vəɾ pri*ə kiʦaj a ʦiko~umpajaj. ɬ~ɮərək waɾʦo~utt, **** miħəʦaan no~ub~b~vəɾ pri*ə no~u tiɾiɬ~ɮan a ʦiko~umpajaj. mirarakataj pawaʡajan **). (nano~u ninaʡaŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ****-**-**) (inkiris so~uwaɾ). *. st. ɾo~u~uʦia. ʦs.mfa.*o~ub~v.ʦn. (****-**-**). (nano~u ninaʡaŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ****-**-**). *. st. ɾo~u~uʦia o~upəns əmb~b~vassj in taiwan; first in asia - fo~uʦo~u~us taiwan. fo~uʦo~u~ustaiwan.tw. (****-**-**). (nano~u ninaʡaŋan tiɾiɬ~ɮ i ****-**-**) (tajwan).
